# Derived Criteria — Acme Co. (extracted from the exec's RFP)

Source: Northwind Legal Group RFP, provided 2026-06-18 (materials/northwind-rfp.pdf). These criteria
are scored alongside the exec's stated top criteria in "Against your priorities" (Plan 03). Kept
separate from the immutable intake.md.

- **Data residency in the EU** — RFP §3.1 requires all data stored in the EU. (Provided doc: materials/northwind-rfp.pdf, §3.1.)
- **No training on customer data** — RFP §4.2 prohibits use of their data to train models. (Provided doc: materials/northwind-rfp.pdf, §4.2.)
- **SSO via SAML** — RFP §6 requires SAML single sign-on. (Provided doc: materials/northwind-rfp.pdf, §6.)
- **Exportable audit logs** — RFP §6 requires exportable audit logs. (Provided doc: materials/northwind-rfp.pdf, §6.)
